name: Star Scope
original_name: เขตเคียงดาว
overview: After the relationship between two boys develops past the point of friendship, one of them leaves without a word. One day, he returns with an incurable illness hoping to fix their relationship and spend his final days with the one he loves.

trailers.title: [OFFICIAL PILOT] Star Scope เขตเคียงดาว | STUDIO WABI SABI
